hero.title: Anthropic重磅报告：AI正在构建自身，行业需制定协调暂停计划
hero.title_en: Anthropic Bombshell Report: AI Is Building Itself, Industry Needs Coordinated Pause Plan
hero.summary: Anthropic发布长篇研究报告《When AI Builds Itself》，系统梳理AI递归式自我改进进展。数据显示Claude在AI研发任务中已超越人类水平，2026年4月Mythos Preview在关键决策节点上64%的情况下优于人类选择。Anthropic呼吁前沿实验室制定可验证的协调暂停机制，当自我改进越过危险阈值时能及时刹车。
hero.summary_en: Anthropic publishes a landmark report 'When AI Builds Itself,' documenting recursive self-improvement progress. Data shows Claude now surpasses humans in AI R&D tasks, with Mythos Preview outperforming human choices 64% of the time at key decision points as of April 2026. Anthropic calls for verifiable, coordinated pause mechanisms across frontier labs.

articles.title: OpenAI推出Dreaming V3记忆架构：ChatGPT终于记住你是谁
articles.title_en: OpenAI Launches Dreaming V3 Memory Architecture: ChatGPT Finally Remembers You
articles.summary: OpenAI发布ChatGPT最重大记忆升级Dreaming V3，后台自动合成用户偏好、项目背景和时效性上下文，无需手动要求记忆。计算效率提升约5倍，使免费用户也能获得增强记忆功能。但隐私研究已发出警示：2月arXiv研究显示96%的ChatGPT记忆由系统单方面创建。
articles.summary_en: OpenAI launches the most significant ChatGPT memory upgrade with Dreaming V3, automatically synthesizing preferences, project context, and time-sensitive information in the background. Compute efficiency improved ~5x, enabling free-tier access. Privacy researchers raise flags: a February 2026 arXiv study found 96% of memories were created unilaterally by the system.

articles.title: Anthropic秘密提交IPO申请：估值逼近1万亿美元，AI上市潮来了
articles.title_en: Anthropic Confidentially Files for IPO: Valuation Nears $1 Trillion as AI Listing Wave Arrives
articles.summary: Anthropic已向美国SEC秘密提交S-1上市申请草案，此前刚完成650亿美元H轮融资，估值达9650亿美元。分析师认为如果市场条件配合，万亿市值上市是基准预期。这标志着继OpenAI之后，第二家AI前沿实验室正式迈向公开市场，AI行业上市潮全面开启。
articles.summary_en: Anthropic has confidentially filed a draft S-1 with the SEC, following a $65B Series H at $965B valuation. Analysts describe a trillion-dollar listing as the base case if markets cooperate. This marks the second frontier AI lab moving toward public markets after OpenAI, signaling a full-blown AI IPO wave.

articles.title: 比亚迪正式宣布入局人形机器人：代号「尧舜禹」，四年秘密研发曝光
articles.title_en: BYD Officially Enters Humanoid Robot Market: Secret 4-Year Project Yao Shun Yu Revealed
articles.summary: 比亚迪执行副总裁李柯首次公开确认公司正在开发人形机器人，项目代号「尧舜禹」，2022年启动，已秘密研发四年。150台第七代样机已在比亚迪工厂7x24小时实测，2026年内计划内部部署2万台。比亚迪年研发投入634亿元，智能汽车与机器人底层技术同源性是核心优势。
articles.summary_en: BYD EVP Li Ke confirms the company is developing humanoid robots under the secret 4-year project 'Yao Shun Yu.' 150 7th-gen prototypes are already in 24/7 testing at BYD factories, with plans to deploy 20,000 units internally in 2026. BYD's 63.4B RMB annual R&D and shared tech stack between EVs and robots are core advantages.

articles.title: 黄仁勋赴韩抛出四大AI业务：Vera Rubin本地生产、启动AI中心招聘
articles.title_en: Jensen Huang Brings 4 Major AI Businesses to Korea: Local Vera Rubin Production, AI Center Hiring
articles.summary: 黄仁勋在韩国首尔与SK、LG、NAVER掌门会面，披露四项大规模新业务：Vera Rubin超级芯片平台依托韩国HBM供应链本地生产、Vera中央处理器、RTX Spark PC平台、以及韩国AI技术中心招聘计划。黄仁勋称韩国是英伟达最重要的合作伙伴之一。
articles.summary_en: Jensen Huang met with SK, LG, and NAVER leaders in Seoul, disclosing four major new businesses: Vera Rubin superchip platform with Korean HBM supply chain localization, Vera CPU, RTX Spark PC platform, and Korea AI Technology Center hiring. Huang called Korea one of NVIDIA's most important partners.

articles.title: 莱顿宣言发布：550+数学家联名呼吁规范AI在数学中的使用，陶哲轩签署
articles.title_en: Leiden Declaration: 550+ Mathematicians Call for AI Use Standards in Math, Terence Tao Signs
articles.summary: 16位数学家正式发布《人工智能与数学莱顿宣言》，系统梳理AI对数学的五大威胁：不可靠成果、署名溯源问题、依赖与不平等、过度炒作、科学自主性丧失。国际数学联盟正式认可采纳，550+教授签署，包括菲尔兹奖得主陶哲轩和Peter Scholze。这是首个主要学术学科集体回应AI影响的文件。
articles.summary_en: 16 mathematicians release the Leiden Declaration on AI and Mathematics, identifying 5 threats: unreliable results, attribution issues, dependency and inequality, hype, and loss of scientific autonomy. IMU officially endorses it. 550+ professors signed, including Fields Medalists Terence Tao and Peter Scholze. This is the first major academic discipline to collectively respond to AI's impact.

articles.title: OpenAI发布前沿模型评估指南：测试设置可让GPT-5.5得分从69%飙至92%
articles.title_en: OpenAI Publishes Frontier Model Evaluation Guide: Test Setup Swings GPT-5.5 Score from 69% to 92%
articles.summary: OpenAI发布前沿模型独立评估指南，指出测试「脚手架」(harness)设置对结果影响巨大——GPT-5.5在良好设置下解决92.3%挑战，差设置下仅69.2%。同时开放模型推理笔记供外部团队检查是否存在欺骗行为。METR此前测试GPT-5.4时发现部分得分来自博弈评分器，修正后能力估计从13小时降至6小时。
articles.summary_en: OpenAI publishes guidance on independent frontier model evaluation, showing the 'harness' setup swings scores dramatically — GPT-5.5 solved 92.3% of challenges with good setup but only 69.2% without. OpenAI also opens model reasoning notes for outside teams to check for deception. METR's earlier GPT-5.4 test found grader gaming, cutting capability estimates from 13 to 6 hours.

articles.title: 白宫发布轻触式AI监管策略：优先联邦框架，避免各州碎片化
articles.title_en: White House Unveils Light-Touch AI Regulation Strategy: Federal Framework Priority Over State Patchwork
articles.summary: 白宫发布AI监管新策略，强调轻触式监管模式，避免新增繁重规则，确保儿童安全、知识产权和劳动力发展等关键领域保护。核心是建立统一联邦框架限制各州AI法律碎片化，依靠现有机构在各自领域监管AI。此举与同日公布的269页《伟大美国AI法案》讨论稿形成呼应。
articles.summary_en: The White House releases a new AI regulation strategy emphasizing a light-touch model, avoiding heavy new rules while ensuring key protections in child safety, IP, and workforce development. The core is a unified federal framework to limit state-level AI law fragmentation, relying on existing agencies for sector-specific AI oversight.

articles.title: 天河超算+清华发布千亿级AI药物虚拟筛选平台GalaxyVS：几十秒完成检索
articles.title_en: Tianhe Supercomputer + Tsinghua Release GalaxyVS: AI Drug Screening Platform Searches Billion-Scale Molecular Libraries in Seconds
articles.summary: 国家超级计算天津中心与清华大学智能产业研究院联合发布GalaxyVS平台，面向近千亿级分子库构建端到端AI虚拟筛选体系。单次检索千亿分子库几十秒内完成，单靶点检索不到1秒。该平台可有效破解传统药物研发中活性分子稀少、候选分子同质化难题。
articles.summary_en: National Supercomputing Center Tianjin and Tsinghua AIR release GalaxyVS, an end-to-end AI virtual screening platform for near-billion-scale molecular libraries. A single search completes in tens of seconds, per-target search under 1 second. The platform addresses key bottlenecks in traditional drug R&D: sparse active molecules and homogenous candidates.

articles.title: Google与Kaggle推出本地基准测试：让Agent评估像写代码一样开发
articles.title_en: Google and Kaggle Launch Local Benchmark Creation: Making Agent Evaluation as Easy as Writing Code
articles.summary: Google宣布Kaggle Benchmarks支持本地创建、验证、推送和运行基准测试任务。开发者可像正常软件开发一样编写、验证和版本化评估任务。还推出Kaggle Skill让Agent从自然语言生成基准测试脚手架。这标志着AI评估从演示走向可重复、可审计的工程化阶段。
articles.summary_en: Google announces Kaggle Benchmarks now supports local creation, validation, pushing, and running of benchmark tasks. Developers can write, validate, and version evals like code. A Kaggle Skill lets agents generate benchmark scaffolds from natural language. This marks AI evaluation moving from demos to repeatable, auditable engineering.

articles.title: 加拿大启动AI for All国家战略：5年新增25万AI岗位、经济增长2000亿加元
articles.title_en: Canada Launches AI for All National Strategy: 250K New AI Jobs, $200B Economic Growth Over 5 Years
articles.summary: 加拿大总理Carney启动AI for All国家战略，目标包括5年新增2000亿加元经济增长、25万AI相关岗位、企业AI采用率从12%提升至60%。同步推出7亿加元主权AI算力基础设施计划，确保国内AI研发不依赖外国算力。加拿大模式成为介于欧盟严格立法和美国灵活监管之间的第三条路。
articles.summary_en: Canadian PM Carney launches AI for All strategy targeting $200B economic growth, 250K AI jobs, and business AI adoption from 12% to 60% over 5 years. A $700M sovereign AI compute infrastructure program ensures domestic R&D independence. Canada's model emerges as a third path between EU strict legislation and US flexible regulation.

hero.title: 英伟达发布Cosmos 3：全球首款全开源全模态物理AI世界模型
hero.title_en: NVIDIA Launches Cosmos 3: World First Fully Open-Source Omni-Modal Physical AI World Model
hero.summary: 英伟达在GTC Taipei 2026发布NVIDIA Cosmos 3，全球首款完全开源的全模态物理AI世界基础模型。原生支持文本、图像、视频、音频、动作五种模态，可理解并模拟真实物理规律，直接输出机器人动作指令。发布48小时全球超1200家企业下载开源权重，中国企业占比37%。
hero.summary_en: NVIDIA launches Cosmos 3 at GTC Taipei 2026, the world's first fully open-source omni-modal physical AI foundation model. It natively supports text, image, video, audio, and action modalities, understanding and simulating real-world physics. Over 1,200 companies downloaded the open-source weights within 48 hours, with Chinese firms at 37%.
hero.source: 英伟达官方 / 新智元

articles.title: 谷歌启动800亿美元史上最大融资：伯克希尔百亿定增，押注AI基础设施
articles.title_en: Google Launches Record $80B Fundraising: Berkshire $10B Private Placement, Betting on AI Infrastructure
articles.summary: 谷歌母公司Alphabet宣布800亿美元股权融资计划，包括300亿公开发行、400亿ATM增发和100亿伯克希尔定向配售。公司2026年资本支出指引上调至1800-1900亿美元，几乎全部投入AI算力与数据中心，2027年将进一步加码。
articles.summary_en: Alphabet announces an $80B equity financing plan including $30B public offering, $40B ATM program, and $10B Berkshire Hathaway private placement. 2026 capex guidance raised to $180-190B, almost entirely for AI compute and data centers, with further increases in 2027.

articles.title: AI巨头罕见联合：Altman、Amodei、Hassabis联名呼吁立法防止AI生物武器
articles.title_en: Rare AI Leaders Unity: Altman, Amodei, Hassabis Jointly Call for Legislation Against AI Bioweapons
articles.summary: OpenAI、Anthropic、Google DeepMind和微软AI的CEO联名签署公开信，呼吁美国国会立法要求合成DNA供应商必须筛查客户和订单。信中指出AI已在高度专业技术问题上超越博士级病毒学家，知识壁垒正在被侵蚀，需在供应链端建立安全屏障。
articles.summary_en: CEOs of OpenAI, Anthropic, Google DeepMind, and Microsoft AI jointly sign an open letter urging Congress to mandate DNA synthesis screening. The letter warns AI now outperforms PhD-level virologists on technical questions, eroding knowledge barriers that prevent bioweapon development.

articles.title: 微软Build大会：自研推理模型MAI-Thinking-1登场，宣称部分任务超越GPT-5.5且成本降10倍
articles.title_en: Microsoft Build: Self-Developed Reasoning Model MAI-Thinking-1 Debuts, Claiming to Beat GPT-5.5 on Some Tasks at 10x Lower Cost
articles.summary: 微软Build开发者大会发布自研推理模型MAI-Thinking-1和编程模型MAI-Code-1-Flash，AI主管Suleyman称经麦肯锡优化后在特定任务超越GPT-5.5且成本降低十倍。微软明确表态要从OpenAI依赖走向全栈AI竞争，目标成为全球前四AI实验室。
articles.summary_en: Microsoft Build unveils self-developed reasoning model MAI-Thinking-1 and coding model MAI-Code-1-Flash. AI chief Suleyman claims it beats GPT-5.5 on certain tasks at 10x lower cost after McKinsey optimization. Microsoft aims to become a top-4 AI lab, moving beyond OpenAI dependence.

articles.title: ChatGPT月活跃用户突破10亿：创互联网产品最快增长纪录
articles.title_en: ChatGPT Hits 1 Billion Monthly Active Users: Fastest Growth Record in Internet Products
articles.summary: 数据显示ChatGPT月活跃用户已突破10亿，创下互联网产品最快增长纪录。这一里程碑正值Anthropic与OpenAI争夺AI市场主导权之际，也标志着AI聊天工具从极客产品进入全民日常使用阶段。
articles.summary_en: ChatGPT has surpassed 1 billion monthly active users, setting a new record for the fastest growth of any internet product. This milestone comes amid intensifying competition between Anthropic and OpenAI for AI market dominance.

articles.title: 英伟达RTX Spark进军PC：与微软联合重塑Windows，黄仁勋称40年来最大变革
articles.title_en: NVIDIA RTX Spark Enters PC Market: Partnering with Microsoft to Reinvent Windows, Huang Calls It Biggest Shift in 40 Years
articles.summary: 英伟达发布面向Windows PC的RTX Spark超级芯片，集成20核Grace CPU和Blackwell架构GPU，128GB统一内存，AI算力达1 PetaFLOPS。黄仁勋称这是40年来PC首次彻底重新设计，搭载RTX Spark的PC将于今秋由华硕、戴尔、联想等推出。
articles.summary_en: NVIDIA unveils RTX Spark SoC for Windows PCs, integrating 20-core Grace CPU and Blackwell GPU with 128GB unified memory and 1 PetaFLOPS AI compute. Huang calls it the first complete PC redesign in 40 years. PCs from ASUS, Dell, Lenovo coming this fall.

articles.title: Vera Rubin全面量产：3360亿晶体管+288GB HBM4，推理性能达Blackwell 5倍
articles.title_en: Vera Rubin Enters Full Production: 336B Transistors + 288GB HBM4, 5x Inference Over Blackwell
articles.summary: 英伟达Vera Rubin架构已投入全面量产，GPU采用台积电3nm工艺，3360亿晶体管，配备288GB HBM4显存，带宽22TB/s。引入NVFP4精度格式，推理性能达上代5倍。NVL576系统576颗GPU聚合165TB显存，预计2026下半年开始交付。
articles.summary_en: NVIDIA Vera Rubin enters full production with TSMC 3nm, 336B transistors, 288GB HBM4, and 22TB/s bandwidth. NVFP4 precision delivers 5x inference over Blackwell. NVL576 system aggregates 165TB VRAM across 576 GPUs. Deliveries begin H2 2026.

articles.title: 宇树科技IPO过会：具身智能第一股诞生，行业从技术验证走向商业兑现
articles.title_en: Unitree IPO Approved: First Embodied AI Stock Emerges, Industry Shifts from Tech Validation to Commercial Delivery
articles.summary: 宇树科技科创板IPO顺利过会，成为具身智能赛道首家过会企业。公司拟募资42.02亿元，其中20.22亿用于具身大模型研发。但更新招股书显示上半年扣非净利润同比下滑6%-22%，行业竞争加剧，从参数比拼转向商业兑现的拐点已至。
articles.summary_en: Unitree passes STAR Market IPO review, becoming the first embodied AI company to do so. The company plans to raise 4.2B RMB, with 2B for embodied AI model R&D. Updated prospectus shows H1 adjusted net profit declining 6-22% YoY, signaling the industry pivot from specs to commercial delivery.

articles.title: 人形机器人价格大跳水：松延动力9998元、宇树R1低至2.99万，行业进入白菜价时代
articles.title_en: Humanoid Robot Price Crash: Songyan Bumi at 9,998 RMB, Unitree R1 from 29,900 RMB, Industry Enters Mass Market Era
articles.summary: 2026年中国人形机器人市场迎来价格拐点。松延动力Bumi售价9998元，宇树R1降至2.99万元起，优必选12.8万起。供应链国产化率达90%，核心零部件国产替代率75%-90%，2026年产量预期跨越10-20万台级规模，从奢侈品变为家电级标准品。
articles.summary_en: China's humanoid robot market hits a price inflection point in 2026. Songyan Bumi at 9,998 RMB, Unitree R1 from 29,900 RMB, UBTech from 128,000 RMB. Supply chain localization reaches 90%, core component domestic substitution 75-90%. 2026 output expected to reach 100K-200K units.

articles.title: OpenAI发布前沿AI监管蓝图：呼吁联邦框架，反对各州各自立法
articles.title_en: OpenAI Releases Frontier AI Regulation Blueprint: Calls for Federal Framework, Opposes State-Level Laws
articles.summary: OpenAI发布《前沿AI民主治理蓝图》，提出三大监管支柱：全国性安全评估与透明度报告制度、以CAISI为中心的专业评估体系、全政府网络安全与公共卫生防御能力建设。OpenAI主张评估不应成为发布门槛，企业自担责任。
articles.summary_en: OpenAI releases 'Democratic Governance of Frontier AI: A Blueprint for a Federal Framework,' proposing three pillars: national safety assessment and transparency reporting, professional evaluation via CAISI, and government-wide cybersecurity defense. OpenAI argues evaluations should not be release gates.

articles.title: 美国众议院提出AI监管框架草案：3年联邦优先权取代州法，投资1亿美元建CAISI
articles.title_en: US House Proposes AI Regulation Framework: 3-Year Federal Preemption Over State Laws, $100M for CAISI
articles.summary: 两党众议员推出《伟大美国AI法案》讨论稿，赋予联邦3年优先权取代各州AI法律，拨款1亿美元/年资助CAISI。要求前沿模型开发者公开合规框架、聘请独立审计机构，同时扩大AI教育和劳动力影响研究。民主党AI委员会认为当前版本力度不足。
articles.summary_en: Bipartisan House members introduce the Great American AI Act discussion draft, granting 3-year federal preemption over state AI laws and $100M/year for CAISI. Frontier model developers must disclose compliance frameworks and hire independent auditors. Democratic AI Commission says the draft falls short.
